creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
Committing build fix under portmgr blanket.

To submitter: next time please make sure you have proper (\n instead or \r\n) line endings in your patch:

% wget 'https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/attachment.cgi?id=162695' -qO- | file - 
/dev/stdin: unified diff output, ASCII text, with CRLF line terminators
                                                  ^^^^
